mapper.select:
SELECT RESULT_DATE, SUM(RESULT_COUNT) AS RESULT_COUNT FROM (
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') + ((LEVEL-1)/24),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS session_id
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS session_id
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS session_id
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS session_id
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24(TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') - TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1)12#{year_count} UNION
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')||':00' AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, session_id
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, session_id
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, session_id
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, session_id
FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE (ACCESS_IP IS NULL OR ACCESS_IP != '10.9.32.167')
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND member_id = #{member_id}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24'), session_id
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), session_id
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm'), session_id
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy'), session_id
) GROUP BY result_date ORDER BY result_date ASC

SELECT a.result_date, sum(b.result_count) AS result_count , b.browser_type FROM (
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') + ((LEVEL-1)/24),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS browser_type
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 (TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') - TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1)12#{year_count} ) a, (
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')||':00' AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, browser_type
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, browser_type
FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE (ACCESS_IP IS NULL OR ACCESS_IP != '10.9.32.167')
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND member_id = #{member_id}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24'), browser_type, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), browser_type, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm'), browser_type, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy'), browser_type, session_id) b
WHERE a.result_date = b.result_date(+) GROUP BY a.result_date, b.browser_type ORDER BY a.result_date ASC

SELECT a.result_date, sum(b.result_count) AS result_count , b.operating_system FROM (
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') + ((LEVEL-1)/24),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS operating_system
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 (TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') - TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1)12#{year_count} ) a, (
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')||':00' AS RESULT_DATE, 1 AS result_count, operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, operating_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, operating_system
FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE (ACCESS_IP IS NULL OR ACCESS_IP != '10.9.32.167')
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND member_id = #{member_id}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24'), operating_system, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), operating_system, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm'), operating_system, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy'), operating_system, session_id) b
WHERE a.result_date = b.result_date(+) GROUP BY a.result_date, b.operating_system ORDER BY a.result_date ASC

SELECT a.result_date, sum(b.result_count) AS result_count , b.access_system FROM (
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') + ((LEVEL-1)/24),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') + ((LEVEL-1)),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01', 'yyyy-mm'), LEVEL - 1),'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{search_year}, 'yyyy'), (LEVEL - 1)*12),'yyyy') AS result_date, 0 AS result_count, '' AS access_system
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 (TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') - TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1)12#{year_count} ) a, (
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24')||':00' AS RESULT_DATE, 1 AS result_count, access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, access_system
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy') AS result_date, 1 AS result_count, access_system
FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE (ACCESS_IP IS NULL OR ACCESS_IP != '10.9.32.167')
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date}||' 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}||' 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND access_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-01-01 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{search_year}||'-12-31 23:59:59', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND member_id = #{member_id}
GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24'), access_system, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), access_system, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy-mm'), access_system, session_id) b
TO_CHAR(access_date, 'yyyy'), access_system, session_id) b
WHERE a.result_date = b.result_date(+) GROUP BY a.result_date, b.access_system ORDER BY a.result_date ASC
SELECT last_login_ip FROM MEMBER_LAST_LOGIN WHERE seq_no = #{seq_no}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_STATUS a USING dual ON ( a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.access_date = TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.${search_type} = a.${search_type}+1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, access_date, ${search_type}, view_${search_type} ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24'), 1, 1 )

MERGE INTO CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_STATUS a USING dual ON ( a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.access_date = TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.view_${search_type} = a.view_${search_type}+1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, access_date, ${search_type}, view_${search_type} ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24'), 0, 1 )
mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS result_date, sum(pc_count) + sum(mobile_count) as result_count FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_STATUS WHERE access_date >= TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND access_date < TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND homepage_id not in ('c0', 'h34', 'h32', 'h27', 'c1')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS result_date, sum(view_pc_count) + sum(view_mobile_count) as result_count FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_STATUS WHERE access_date >= TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND access_date < TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND homepage_id not in ('c0', 'h34', 'h32', 'h27', 'c1')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS result_date, sum(pc_count) as pc_count, sum(mobile_count) as mobile_count, sum(pc_count) + sum(mobile_count) as total_count FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_STATUS WHERE access_date >= TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND access_date < TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND homepage_id not in ('c0', 'h34', 'h32', 'h27', 'c1')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS result_date, sum(view_pc_count) as pc_count, sum(view_mobile_count) as mobile_count, sum(view_pc_count) + sum(view_mobile_count) as total_count FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_STATUS WHERE access_date >= TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND access_date < TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND homepage_id not in ('c0', 'h34', 'h32', 'h27', 'c1')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(access_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
